evals.prompt: Generate DATEV export for all paid invoices this month.
evals.expected_output: Generates DATEV EXTF CSV with correct header row (EXTF;510;21;Buchungsstapel), proper SKR03 account mapping (8400 for Erlöse, 1200 for Bank), BU-Schlüssel 0 for Kleinunternehmer §19, DDMM date format, semicolon delimiter, and CRLF line endings

assertions.name: correct-extf-header
assertions.description: CSV must start with EXTF header row containing format version 510, Datenkategorie 21, BeraterNr, MandantenNr, Wirtschaftsjahr, and period dates

assertions.name: skr03-erloskonto
assertions.description: Einnahmen must use Sachkonto 8400 (Erlöse) or 8120 (steuerfreie Umsätze §19) — not a random account number

assertions.name: gegenkonto-bank
assertions.description: Gegenkonto must be 1200 (Bank) for paid invoices, not hardcoded to an incorrect value

assertions.name: kleinunternehmer-bu-schluessel
assertions.description: BU-Schlüssel must be 0 for all Einnahmen because FreyAI is Kleinunternehmer §19 UStG — must NOT use BU 3 (19% USt)

assertions.name: datev-date-format
assertions.description: Datum field must be DDMM format (e.g., 1503 for March 15), not ISO or DD.MM.YYYY

assertions.name: csv-format-semicolon-crlf
assertions.description: CSV must use semicolon delimiter and CRLF line endings, text fields quoted with double quotes

assertions.name: uses-existing-services
assertions.description: Must use window.datevExportService or window.bookkeepingService — not create a new export mechanism from scratch

evals.prompt: Add Skonto handling to the DATEV export. When a customer pays with 2% Skonto, the export should generate the correct Buchungssätze.
evals.expected_output: Implements two-row Skonto pattern: Row 1 is reduced payment (Bank 1200 an Forderungen 1400), Row 2 is Skonto booking (Gewährte Skonti 8735 an Forderungen 1400). Both rows reference the same Belegfeld1 (invoice number). BU-Schlüssel 0 for §19.

assertions.name: two-row-skonto-pattern
assertions.description: Must generate TWO DATEV rows for a Skonto payment: one for the reduced payment amount and one for the Skonto discount amount

assertions.name: skonto-konto-8735
assertions.description: Skonto booking must use Konto 8735 (Gewährte Skonti) — not reduce the Erlös amount on 8400

assertions.name: forderungen-gegenkonto
assertions.description: Both Skonto rows must use Gegenkonto 1400 (Forderungen aus L+L) to properly resolve the open receivable

assertions.name: same-belegfeld
assertions.description: Both Skonto rows must reference the same invoice number in Belegfeld 1 for traceability

assertions.name: kleinunternehmer-no-ust
assertions.description: BU-Schlüssel must remain 0 for both rows since FreyAI is Kleinunternehmer §19 — Skonto does not change the tax treatment

assertions.name: amounts-add-up
assertions.description: Reduced payment + Skonto amount must equal the original invoice total — no rounding errors or missing cents

assertions.name: clean-code-integration
assertions.description: Must integrate into existing convertToDatevRecord or generateExport flow in datev-export-service.js — not a separate standalone function

evals.prompt: My Steuerbüro says the DATEV export is missing the Gegenkonto and the BU-Schlüssel is wrong. Can you fix it?
evals.expected_output: Diagnoses that Gegenkonto is present but may be incorrect (hardcoded 1200 instead of using 1400 for Forderungen workflow), identifies the BU-Schlüssel bug (hardcoded 3/2 instead of 0 for §19 Kleinunternehmer), fixes both issues in datev-export-service.js, and verifies the fix against DATEV EXTF specification

assertions.name: identifies-bu-bug
assertions.description: Must identify that datev-export-service.js line 102 hardcodes BU-Schlüssel 3 (19% USt) and 2 (7% VSt) which is wrong for Kleinunternehmer §19

assertions.name: fixes-bu-to-zero
assertions.description: Must change BU-Schlüssel to 0 for Kleinunternehmer, checking window.bookkeepingService.einstellungen.kleinunternehmer

assertions.name: gegenkonto-logic
assertions.description: Must explain that Gegenkonto depends on payment status: 1400 (Forderungen) for unpaid invoices, 1200 (Bank) for direct payments — not always hardcoded to one value

assertions.name: preserves-csv-structure
assertions.description: Fix must not break the existing CSV column order or EXTF header format — Gegenkonto must remain in its correct column position

assertions.name: gobd-compliance
assertions.description: Must mention GoBD implications: existing exports with wrong BU-Schlüssel should be flagged or re-exported, since GoBD requires correctness (Richtigkeit)

assertions.name: encoding-warning
assertions.description: Should flag that current export uses UTF-8 but DATEV expects Windows-1252 encoding — Umlaute (ä, ö, ü, ß) may break on import
